use serde::Deserialize;

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct ServerConfig {
    host: String,
    port: u16,
    max_connections: usize,
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct AppConfig {
    name: String,
    version: String,
    debug: bool,
    database_url: String,
}

fn load_config(path: &str) -> Result<ServerConfig, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let data = std::fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let config: ServerConfig = serde_json::from_str(&data)?;
    Ok(config)
}

fn load_app_config(path: &str) -> Result<AppConfig, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let data = std::fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let config: AppConfig = serde_json::from_str(&data)?;
    Ok(config)
}
